languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, Ваша Светлость! Беда! Зарков вновь захлестнули металлические {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносы{/g}, увешанные плотью. И в этот раз их больше. По рапортам, старое их логово, те руины, сверкают зеленым чужацким светом... это полноценное вторжение, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, Ваша Светлость! Беда! Зарков вновь захлестнули металлические {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносы{/g}, увешанные плотью. И в этот раз их больше. По рапортам, старое их логово, те руины, сверкают зеленым чужацким светом... это полноценное вторжение, Лорд-капитан".

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, Ваша Светлость! Беда! Зарков вновь захлестнули металлические {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносы{/g}, увешанные плотью. И в этот раз их больше. По рапортам, старое их логово, те руины, сверкают зеленым чужацким светом... это полноценное вторжение, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal xenos draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal xenos draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal xenos draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."

languages.text: 「陛下、陛下！大惨事！ザルコフはまた、肉で覆われた金属{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}外敵{/g}に圧倒されました。しかも今回は、その数がさらに増えています。報告によると、彼らの旧巣窟、あの廃墟は、奇妙な緑色の光を放っているそうです…これは大規模な侵略です、艦長様」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「御尊顔、御尊顔！大惨事！ザルコフはまた、肉で覆われた金属外敵に圧倒されました。しかも今回は、その数がさらに増えています。報告によると、彼らの旧巣窟、あの廃墟は、奇妙な緑色の光を放っているそうです…これは大規模な侵略です、艦長様。」
「陛下、陛下！大惨事！ザルコフはまた、肉で覆われた金属{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}外敵{/g}に圧倒されました。しかも今回は、その数がさらに増えています。報告によると、彼らの旧巣窟、あの廃墟は、奇妙な緑色の光を放っているそうです…これは大規模な侵略です、艦長様」

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}, mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡Es un desastre! Zarkov vuelve a sufrir el asalto de los {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} de metal cubiertos de carne. Esta vez hay más que antes. Según los informes, su antigua guarida en las ruinas brilla con una extraña luz verde... Es una invasión total, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}, mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡Es un desastre! Zarkov vuelve a sufrir el asalto de los {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} de metal cubiertos de carne. Esta vez hay más que antes. Según los informes, su antigua guarida en las ruinas brilla con una extraña luz verde... Es una invasión total, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: “大人！不好了！大批身披人皮的金属{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}在扎尔科夫卷土重来，且数量远超以往。报告称，它们的老巢，也就是那片遗迹，正散发出诡异的绿光……这是一次全面入侵，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: “{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}，{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}！不好了！大批身披人皮的金属{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}在扎尔科夫卷土重来，且数量远超以往。报告称，它们的老巢，也就是那片遗迹，正散发出诡异的绿光……这是一次全面入侵，舰长大人。”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Katastrophe! Zarkov wurde erneut von in Fleisch gehüllten {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} aus Metall überrannt. Und dieses Mal sind es mehr. Berichten zufolge erstrahlt ihr altes Versteck, diese Ruinen, in einem seltsamen grünen Licht ... Das ist eine Invasion, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Katastrophe! Zarkov wurde erneut von in Fleisch gehüllten {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} aus Metall überrannt. Und dieses Mal sind es mehr. Berichten zufolge erstrahlt ihr altes Versteck, diese Ruinen, in einem seltsamen grünen Licht ... Das ist eine Invasion, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Felaket! Zarkov bir kez daha etlere bürünmüş metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} istilasına uğramış. Bu sefer sayıları daha fazla. Raporlar, eski inleri olan o harabelerin tuhaf bir yeşil ışıkla parladığını söylüyor... Bu topyekûn bir istila Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Felaket! Zarkov bir kez daha etlere bürünmüş metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} istilasına uğramış. Bu sefer sayıları daha fazla. Raporlar, eski inleri olan o harabelerin tuhaf bir yeşil ışıkla parladığını söylüyor... Bu topyekûn bir istila Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie ! Votre Seigneurie ! C'est un désastre ! Une fois de plus, Zarkov est envahie de {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} de métal enveloppés de chair. Et cette fois, ils sont plus nombreux. D'après nos rapports, les vieilles ruines qui leur servent de repaire sont baignées d'une étrange lueur verte... Il s'agit d'une invasion à grande échelle, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Disaster! Zarkov has again been overwhelmed by metal {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} draped in flesh. And this time there are more of them. Reports say their old lair, those ruins, are glowing with a strange green light... It's a full-scale invasion, Lord Captain."
